description: Hierarchical navigation trail. Wraps existing <ol> markup HTML-first, or auto-generates from window.location.pathname. Emits BreadcrumbList JSON-LD for SEO.

attributes.name: data-from-pathname
attributes.description: When present, auto-generates the trail from window.location.pathname. Each path segment becomes a crumb (Title-Cased by default; override per segment via the .labels property).

attributes.name: data-current-label
attributes.description: Label for the final (current page) crumb when auto-generating. If omitted, the document title or last path segment is used.

attributes.name: data-separator
attributes.description: Separator glyph variant: 'chevron' (default), 'arrow', 'dot', 'pipe'. Drives the --_separator CSS var.

attributes.name: data-collapsed
attributes.description: Hide middle items, showing only first and last with an ellipsis in between.

childAttributes.name: data-truncated
childAttributes.description: Apply to a crumb <li> to truncate long labels with an ellipsis (max-width 10rem).
